case_title: COAST TRUCK RENTAL VS AGUIRRE RAYMOND AKA RAYMOND AGUIRRE YANEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $385.50 FILED BY COAST TRUCK RENTAL AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE RAYMOND AKA RAYMOND AGUIRRE YANEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
